---
title: "Optional: Advanced Designs — Two-Factor Analysis"
author: "UFHCI BCB-SR Bioinformatics Unit"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries}
library(limma)
library(edgeR)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggrepel)
library(pheatmap)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(here)

set.seed(42)

results_dir <- here("demo-analysis", "output", "02-differential-expression", "results")
figures_dir <- here("demo-analysis", "output", "02-differential-expression", "figures")

dir.create(results_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
dir.create(figures_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
```

```{r load-data}
drosophila_counts <- read.table(
  here("demo-analysis", "data", "two-factor-design", "salmon.merged.gene_counts.tsv"),
  header    = TRUE,
  row.names = "gene_name"
)
drosophila_counts$gene_id <- NULL

drosophila_info <- read.table(
  here("demo-analysis", "data", "two-factor-design", "dme_elev_samples.tsv"),
  header           = TRUE,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
drosophila_info$pop_temp <- paste(drosophila_info$population,
                                   drosophila_info$temp, sep = "_")

print(table(drosophila_info$population, drosophila_info$temp))
```

```{r dge}
DGE_dros               <- DGEList(counts = drosophila_counts, samples = drosophila_info)
DGE_dros$samples$group <- factor(drosophila_info$pop_temp)
keep_dros              <- filterByExpr(DGE_dros, group = DGE_dros$samples$group)
DGE_dros               <- DGE_dros[keep_dros, , keep.lib.sizes = FALSE]
DGE_dros               <- calcNormFactors(DGE_dros, method = "TMM")

cat("Genes after filtering:", nrow(DGE_dros), "\n")
```

```{r mds, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
mds_dros <- plotMDS(DGE_dros, top = 500, plot = FALSE, gene.selection = "common")

mds_dros_df <- data.frame(
  sample      = rownames(DGE_dros$samples),
  dim1        = mds_dros$x,
  dim2        = mds_dros$y,
  population  = DGE_dros$samples$population,
  temperature = DGE_dros$samples$temp
)

ggplot(mds_dros_df, aes(x = dim1, y = dim2,
                         color = population, shape = temperature)) +
  geom_point(size = 4) +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = sample), size = 3) +
  labs(title = "MDS Plot: Drosophila Temperature Experiment",
       x = paste0("Dim 1 (", round(mds_dros$var.explained[1] * 100, 1), "%)"),
       y = paste0("Dim 2 (", round(mds_dros$var.explained[2] * 100, 1), "%)"),
       color = "Population", shape = "Temperature") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1")
```

```{r design-additive}
DGE_dros$samples$population <- factor(DGE_dros$samples$population,
                                       levels = c("maine", "panama"))
DGE_dros$samples$temp       <- factor(DGE_dros$samples$temp,
                                       levels = c("high", "low"))

design_2factor <- model.matrix(~population + temp, data = DGE_dros$samples)
design_2factor
```

```{r fit-additive, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
vwts_2factor <- voomWithQualityWeights(DGE_dros,
                                        design           = design_2factor,
                                        normalize.method = "none",
                                        plot             = TRUE)

fit_2factor <- lmFit(vwts_2factor, design_2factor)
fit_2factor <- eBayes(fit_2factor, robust = TRUE)

summary(decideTests(fit_2factor, adjust.method = "fdr", p.value = 0.05))
```

```{r results-additive}
temp_results <- topTable(fit_2factor, coef = "templow",
                          adjust.method = "BH", number = Inf)
pop_results  <- topTable(fit_2factor, coef = "populationpanama",
                          adjust.method = "BH", number = Inf)

cat("Temperature main effect (FDR < 0.05):",
    sum(temp_results$adj.P.Val < 0.05), "\n")
cat("Population main effect (FDR < 0.05): ",
    sum(pop_results$adj.P.Val < 0.05), "\n")
```

```{r volcano-additive, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
temp_results$category <- case_when(
  temp_results$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & temp_results$logFC >  1 ~ "Up in Low",
  temp_results$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & temp_results$logFC < -1 ~ "Up in High",
  temp_results$adj.P.Val < 0.05                            ~ "Significant",
  TRUE                                                      ~ "Not Significant"
)

ggplot(temp_results, aes(x = logFC, y = -log10(P.Value), color = category)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("Up in Low"       = "blue",
                                "Up in High"      = "red",
                                "Significant"     = "orange",
                                "Not Significant" = "grey80")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-1, 1), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", alpha = 0.5) +
  labs(title = "Temperature Main Effect (Averaged Across Populations)",
       x = "Log2 Fold Change (Low vs High)", y = "-Log10 P-value") +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(here(figures_dir, "volcano_drosophila_temperature.png"),
       width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
```

```{r design-interaction}
DGE_dros$samples$group_combined <- factor(
  paste(DGE_dros$samples$population, DGE_dros$samples$temp, sep = "_"),
  levels = c("maine_high", "maine_low", "panama_high", "panama_low")
)

design_interaction              <- model.matrix(~0 + group_combined,
                                                 data = DGE_dros$samples)
colnames(design_interaction)    <- levels(DGE_dros$samples$group_combined)
design_interaction
```

```{r contrasts}
cont_matrix <- makeContrasts(
  Maine_TempEffect  = maine_low - maine_high,
  Panama_TempEffect = panama_low - panama_high,
  Pop_at_High       = panama_high - maine_high,
  Pop_at_Low        = panama_low - maine_low,
  Interaction       = (maine_low - maine_high) - (panama_low - panama_high),
  levels            = design_interaction
)
cont_matrix
```

```{r fit-interaction, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
vwts_interaction <- voomWithQualityWeights(DGE_dros,
                                            design           = design_interaction,
                                            normalize.method = "none",
                                            plot             = TRUE)

fit_interaction <- lmFit(vwts_interaction, design_interaction)
fit_contrasts   <- contrasts.fit(fit_interaction, cont_matrix)
fit_contrasts   <- eBayes(fit_contrasts, robust = TRUE)

contrast_summary <- decideTests(fit_contrasts, adjust.method = "fdr", p.value = 0.05)
summary(contrast_summary)
```

```{r venn, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
vennDiagram(contrast_summary[, c("Maine_TempEffect",
                                   "Panama_TempEffect",
                                   "Interaction")],
            circle.col = c("blue", "red", "green"),
            main       = "Overlap of DE Genes Across Contrasts")
```

```{r extract-contrasts}
maine_temp  <- topTable(fit_contrasts, coef = "Maine_TempEffect",
                         adjust.method = "BH", number = Inf, sort.by = "P")
panama_temp <- topTable(fit_contrasts, coef = "Panama_TempEffect",
                         adjust.method = "BH", number = Inf, sort.by = "P")
interaction <- topTable(fit_contrasts, coef = "Interaction",
                         adjust.method = "BH", number = Inf, sort.by = "P")

cat("Maine temperature effect: ", sum(maine_temp$adj.P.Val < 0.05), "\n")
cat("Panama temperature effect:", sum(panama_temp$adj.P.Val < 0.05), "\n")
cat("Interaction:              ", sum(interaction$adj.P.Val < 0.05), "\n")
```

```{r classify-patterns}
all_genes <- rownames(maine_temp)

contrast_results <- data.frame(
  gene              = all_genes,
  Maine_logFC       = maine_temp[all_genes, "logFC"],
  Maine_FDR         = maine_temp[all_genes, "adj.P.Val"],
  Panama_logFC      = panama_temp[all_genes, "logFC"],
  Panama_FDR        = panama_temp[all_genes, "adj.P.Val"],
  Interaction_logFC = interaction[all_genes, "logFC"],
  Interaction_FDR   = interaction[all_genes, "adj.P.Val"]
) %>%
  mutate(
    Maine_sig       = Maine_FDR < 0.05,
    Panama_sig      = Panama_FDR < 0.05,
    Interaction_sig = Interaction_FDR < 0.05,
    pattern = case_when(
      Maine_sig & Panama_sig & !Interaction_sig &
        sign(Maine_logFC) == sign(Panama_logFC) ~ "Parallel",
      Interaction_sig                           ~ "Divergent",
      Maine_sig  & !Panama_sig                  ~ "Maine-specific",
      Panama_sig & !Maine_sig                   ~ "Panama-specific",
      TRUE                                      ~ "Not significant"
    )
  )

print(table(contrast_results$pattern))
```

```{r heatmap-divergent, fig.width=10, fig.height=8}
top_divergent <- contrast_results %>%
  filter(pattern == "Divergent") %>%
  arrange(Interaction_FDR) %>%
  head(50) %>%
  pull(gene)

divergent_expr <- vwts_interaction$E[top_divergent, ]

col_annotation <- data.frame(
  Population  = DGE_dros$samples$population,
  Temperature = DGE_dros$samples$temp,
  row.names   = colnames(divergent_expr)
)

pheatmap(divergent_expr,
         scale          = "row",
         annotation_col = col_annotation,
         cluster_cols   = FALSE,
         show_rownames  = TRUE,
         main           = "Top 50 Genes with Divergent Temperature Responses",
         color          = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
         fontsize_row   = 6)
```

```{r export}
write.csv(contrast_results,
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_contrast_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(maine_temp,
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_maine_temperature.csv"))
write.csv(panama_temp,
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_panama_temperature.csv"))
write.csv(interaction,
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_interaction.csv"))
write.csv(contrast_results %>% filter(pattern == "Parallel"),
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_parallel_response_genes.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(contrast_results %>% filter(pattern == "Divergent"),
          here(results_dir, "drosophila_divergent_response_genes.csv"),
          row.names = FALSE)

cat("✓ All results exported\n")
```

```{r sessioninfo}
sessionInfo()
```
